title: Why have you come here, go to your parents: Uttarakhand HC tells runaway couple before granting relief
description: The Uttarakhand High Court on Friday grilled a runaway couple for marrying against the wishes of their families, before directing the police to ensure their protection. Justice Rakesh Thapliyal was dealing with the plea of an 18-year-old woman and a 21-year-old man, who had recently married at a temple. The Court was told that the woman's family members was not agreeable to the marriage and that the couple was facing threats from them.However, the Court wondered whether parents should have no sa
